missions.name: Roslin Standing Order
missions.description: Reference standards from the Roslin archive in Midlothian. The practice has reordered the same case once a decade for two centuries; this run is on schedule.

missions.name: Curing Supplies from Saturn
missions.description: Long-aged preservatives from the Saturnine endowment cellars. The practice sends a finished portion home with each patient; the cellars know what we like.

missions.name: Cryogenic Reagent Run
missions.description: Coolant chemistry from Neptune for the patient ward's suspension cylinders. The moons can hold the cold, but only if we keep the reagent fresh.
